use_cases: Dragging and dropping multiple files onto a cyberpunk-styled upload zone with visual feedback
Previewing uploaded images as thumbnails before or during upload progress
Tracking real-time upload progress for each file with animated progress indicators
Managing a batch of files with the ability to remove individual files or clear all
Handling various file types (images, videos, documents, code, archives) with distinct icons
ai_summary: A cyberpunk-themed file uploader component featuring drag-and-drop functionality, real-time upload progress tracking, and image preview generation. Styled with dark mode aesthetics, neon accents, and glass-morphism effects for a futuristic interface. Supports multiple file types including images, videos, documents, and archives with appropriate icons. Includes expand/collapse functionality and file removal capabilities for managing upload queues.
